news.title: Blood trail leads to suspect in MARTA bus shooting
news.summary: A man and a woman were hospitalized Wednesday night after an accidental gun discharge aboard a MARTA bus near Roswell Road and Glenridge Road in Sandy Springs, according to police.

news.title: Crime center supervisor accused of misusing Flock data to track domestic partner, charged by GBI
news.summary: A real-time crime center operator in metro Atlanta is accused of using her access to Flock Safety license plate reader data to track her domestic partner.

news.title: 14-year-old boy killed, 12-year-old girl injured in Stockbridge shooting
Mother of 4 killed by on-again, off-again boyfriend, family says
news.summary: Brandy Bess was found dead in a DeKalb County home earlier this month.

news.title: 2 rushed to hospital after gun discharged on MARTA bus in Sandy Springs, police say
news.summary: This is also believed to be the first shooting on MARTA transportation since before the World Cup began.

news.title: Doraville Police: Suspect called 911 to say she shot someone
news.summary: Officers arrived at the scene and located who they said was the shooter. She was taken into custody.

news.title: Suspect on Atlanta's 'Top 10 Most Wanted Fugitives' list arrested in connection with 2021 deadly shooting
news.summary: The Atlanta Police Department said 24-year-old Darius Williams was taken into custody in on July 21

news.title: Gwinnett County traffic stop leads to arrest over licensing dispute
news.summary: Gwinnett County police arrested a driver on Loganville Highway near Hope Hollow Road on June 25 after an officer noticed his license plate did not match.

news.title: Bloody late-night knock on neighbor's door leads to Paulding arrest
news.summary: A 62-year-old U.S. Army veteran is in the ICU with brain bleeding after a severe beating at a Paulding County home.

news.title: 14-year-old boy killed, 12-year-old girl injured in shooting in Stockbridge subdivision: police
news.summary: A 14-year-old boy was also found with a gunshot wound and "showed no signs of life" when officers arrived, police said.

news.title: Video shows moment Conyers Police use PIT maneuver to end high-speed chase
news.summary: When officers tried to make a stop, the driver sped off, prompting a chase that went into DeKalb County.

news.title: Atlanta police capture Top 10 Most Wanted murder suspect Darius Williams
news.summary: Atlanta police arrested Most Wanted murder suspect Darius Williams in Athens-Clarke County on Tuesday following a 2021 fatal shooting.

news.title: Georgia film tax fraud: Southwest Georgia men guilty in $550K scheme
news.summary: Two Tifton men face decades in prison after pleading guilty in a Southwest Georgia film tax fraud scheme involving $550,000 in fake refunds.

news.title: Dead bat tests positive for rabies in south DeKalb County
news.summary: A dead bat tested positive for rabies in DeKalb County after being found near Columbia Drive and York Place on Tuesday.

news.title: Conyers police chase: Two arrested after hotel car break-ins
news.summary: Conyers police arrested two men following a vehicle pursuit linked to at least 28 hotel car break-ins in Conyers.

news.title: Hampton drive-by shooting: Police search for Deodar Lane suspects
news.summary: Henry County police are investigating a Hampton drive-by shooting after a home was hit by gunfire Wednesday morning.

news.title: Butts County drone contraband bust: Deputies intercept prison delivery on I-75
news.summary: A traffic stop on Interstate 75 in Butts County uncovered a large drone packed with drugs, electronics and weapons bound for Ware State Prison.

news.title: Death investigation underway at Paulding County home, sheriff says
news.summary: Authorities launched a death investigation Wednesday following a discovery at a Dallas home in the 30 block of Palace Point.

news.title: 4 people shot in Atlanta's Bankhead neighborhood, police say
